Justification.Explanation: High-Level Requirement HL-MAP-2.2 still contains a typographical error in its Name ("Cell Clasification"). Although Low-Level Requirements have been updated to use the corrected name "Cell Classification," traceability requires the HL to be corrected as well to avoid inconsistency across reviews and tooling.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: Localization and Pose Estimation (LL-LOC-7.1) in the current LL5 content has a clean, non-circular dependency graph: it refines HL-EXPL-1.1 and depends on LL-EXPL-1.2, LL-INTERF-6.1, and LL-MAP-2.1. There is no duplication of a DependsOn to LL-EXPL-1.1 present in LL-LOC-7.1, so the prior redundancy issue appears resolved in this iteration.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-LOC-7.1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Localization and Pose Estimation</Name> <Relationships> <Refines>HL-EXPL-1.1</Refines> <DependsOn>LL-EXPL-1.2</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-INTERF-6.1</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-MAP-2.1</DependsOn> </Relationships> <Content>Robot shall estimate its pose in the environment using sensor fusion and provide pose with uncertainty; Pose updates shall be integrated into the map and planning modules.</Content> </Requirement>

<Note>This finding reflects the combination of earlier findings that addressed redundancy in LL-LOC-7.1. The changes above (removing a prior conflicting DependsOn to LL-EXPL-1.1 and keeping a single trace mechanism) have been integrated. No additional separate LL changes are required beyond LL-LOC-7.1 in this iteration.</Note>
